title: ppt2notes course memory
description: Compact persistent memory shared across lecture-note generations for one course.

title.description: Best-known course title, inferred from memory, file names, metadata, or lecture content.

level.description: Inferred learner level such as introductory, undergraduate, graduate, or unknown.

topic_scope.description: One concise sentence describing the course domain.

lectures.description: Compact records for processed source files, in processing order.

summary.description: Two to four Chinese sentences summarizing this lecture.

terms.description: Important terms introduced across the course.

definition.description: Compact Chinese definition grounded in the course material.

symbols.description: Mathematical symbols or notation conventions established by the course.

last_lecture_summary.description: Short bridge from the most recent processed lecture.

open_threads.description: Conceptual threads likely to continue in later lectures.

avoid_repeating.description: Foundational explanations already covered enough; mention briefly instead of re-teaching.
